sectionNote: Two ways to work with me. One gets you elite output. The other gets you a partner who is personally invested in your growth.

items.name: Edit Engine
items.summary: High-volume, high-craft short-form output for brands that already have footage and need it weaponized.
features: Hook & caption engineering on every cut
Script polish on your raw ideas

items.name: Growth Operator
items.summary: Full-stack growth partnership. I run your content operation end-to-end and answer for the numbers, not just the edits.
features: Monthly performance readout, in plain numbers

items.name: Campaign Sprint
items.summary: A single campaign, end-to-end: strategy, script, production, edit, and launch. Built for openings, offers, and events.

footnote: Prices are ranges, not riddles. Final quote depends on scope and turnaround. Retainers are month-to-month. If the work doesn't perform, you shouldn't keep paying for it.
